# Experimental design

Samples of two different species were collected: common octopus (*Octopus vulgaris*) and turbot (Scophthalmus maximus). Se muestrearon 5 individuos de cada especie. De cada individuo se

![Experimental workflow comparing four DNA extraction kits (MasterPure, PureLink, PowerSoil, PowerFecal) across microbiome samples from octopus (Octopus vulgaris) and turbot (Scophthalmus maximus). Each individual (n = 5 per species) was sampled for four subsamples per tissue (skin/mantle or skin/gut), one for each extraction kit, totaling 80 samples.](images/experimental_design.png){#exp_design fig-align="center"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(here)
library(readxl)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

df <- read_excel(here("analysis", "01_data", "samples_data.xlsx"), sheet = "samples")

kable(
  df,
  caption = "Table 1. Summary of sample"
) %>%
  kable_styling(
    full_width = FALSE,
    position = "left"
  )
```

::: table-note
<strong>Note:</strong><br> IIM ID: Sample ID assigned in Aquabiotec Lab.<br> PBM ID: Sample ID assigned in Pescanova Marine Center.
:::
